name: Divemon

signature_move.name: Fillet Blade
signature_move.description: Slashes the enemy with the sharp fins all over its body.

description: A Digimon that evolved via data studying the swimming styles of top swimmers. Although it has a merman-like appearance, it is capable of moving bipedally on land. Its swimming speed is top-class even among Aquatic Digimon, and its four eyes never lose sight of its underwater prey. Contrary to its ferocious appearance, it has a fair play spirit that pursues beautiful swimming. Its Special Moves are slashing the enemy with the sharp fins all over its body ( Fillet Blade ), and hurling pressurized water like a blade ( Ripple Edge ). Its " Liquid Veil ", which is invoked when Divemon is active on land, envelops it in water armor and enhances its physical ability. As a result, even in places without water, it is able to exhibit the same strength as when it is underwater.
